Environmental Protection.summary: Sullivan has consistently supported expanded resource development and opposed restrictions on oil and gas drilling in Alaska.
voted_for: Approval of Willow Project oil drilling in Alaska (Senate vote, March 2023)
ANWR oil drilling authorization in Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Sullivan has voted for federal abortion restrictions and against expanding reproductive health access.
voted_for: 20-week abortion ban (Senate vote, January 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Sullivan voted against federal LGBTQ+ protections while supporting religious exemptions.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Sullivan supported bipartisan criminal justice reform legislation.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate vote, December 2018)

Environmental Protection.summary: Murkowski supports resource development while backing some conservation measures and climate research.
voted_for: Willow Project approval (Senate vote, March 2023)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2021)
voted_against: Green New Deal resolution (Senate vote, March 2019)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Murkowski supports abortion access and opposed overturning Roe while backing some restrictions.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Murkowski has supported federal LGBTQ+ protections including marriage equality.

Employment Non-Discrimination Act (Senate vote, November 2013)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Murkowski supported bipartisan criminal justice reform.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate vote, December 2018)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Begich has opposed federal abortion access legislation.

Galvin has been a longtime public education advocate and supports increased school funding.
